name: Lucia's Broccoli and Macaroni
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the broccoli into small pieces and cook in a large pot of salted water until done. Reserve the broccoli.
2. Cook the macaroni in the same water.
3. In a separate pan, sauté garlic slices in equal parts vegetable oil and olive oil (as needed) until golden; discard the garlic.
4. Cut the bacon into 1-inch pieces and sauté in batches in the same oil.
5. Add the cooked onion to the bacon drippings.
6. Combine all ingredients and serve warm. The broccoli may fall apart slightly.
